title: Rebuild Admin Inbox Page with Proper Contact Form Submissions Display

requirements.summary: Update the hardcoded admin password in the useAdminAuth hook to 'debrajhero' with case-sensitive matching
acceptanceCriteria: Entering 'debrajhero' grants access to the admin inbox
Entering any other string (including 'Debrajhero' or 'DEBRAJHERO') is rejected
Authenticated state is persisted in sessionStorage so page refresh does not log the admin out

file_operations.description: Update the ADMIN_PASSWORD constant to exactly 'debrajhero' and ensure the password comparison in the login function is case-sensitive. Verify sessionStorage persistence is working correctly to maintain authenticated state across page refreshes.

requirements.summary: Rebuild the AdminPage component to be fully protected by AdminPasswordGate and render AdminInbox after authentication
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /admin shows a password prompt before any inbox content is visible
After entering 'debrajhero', the admin inbox is rendered
The inbox displays all submitted contact form entries (name, phone, business type, message, timestamp)
A logout button in the header clears the session and returns to the password prompt
Loading, error, and empty states are handled gracefully with clear UI feedback

file_operations.description: Ensure AdminPasswordGate wraps the entire AdminInbox component so no inbox content is visible until authentication succeeds. Verify the logout button in the sticky header properly calls the logout function from useAdminAuth and clears the session, returning the user to the password prompt.

requirements.summary: Rebuild the AdminInbox component to reliably fetch and display all contact form submissions without Internet Identity auth checks
acceptanceCriteria: getAllInquiries is called on mount and results are displayed without requiring Internet Identity login
Each submission card/row shows: submitter name, phone number, business type, message, and submission date/time
A refresh button allows the admin to reload submissions without navigating away
Empty state shows a clear message when no submissions exist
Error state shows a descriptive error message if the backend call fails

file_operations.description: Remove any Internet Identity authentication checks that block the inbox from loading. Ensure the useGetAllInquiries hook is called unconditionally on mount to fetch all submissions from the backend. Display each inquiry with all fields (name, phone, businessType, message, timestamp) in a structured card or table layout. Add a manual refresh button that re-fetches data using the queryClient.invalidateQueries pattern. Implement clear loading spinner, error message, and empty state ('No submissions yet') UI feedback.

requirements.summary: Wire the /admin route into the React Router in App.tsx so AdminPage is accessible via direct URL navigation
acceptanceCriteria: Visiting <app-url>/admin in the browser loads the AdminPage with the password gate
The /admin route does not appear in the main public navigation
All other existing page sections (Hero, About, Services, Portfolio, Pricing, Contact, Footer) continue to render correctly on the root / route

file_operations.description: Import React Router (BrowserRouter, Routes, Route) and wrap the application. Define two routes: the root '/' route rendering all existing public sections (Navigation, Hero, About, Services, Portfolio, Pricing, WhyChooseMe, Contact, Footer, WhatsApp button) in order, and a '/admin' route rendering the AdminPage component. Ensure Navigation is included on both routes or placed outside Routes if it should appear globally. Do not add /admin to the public navigation links.
